title: Market Brief — Monday, June 8, 2026
summary: GPU oversupply is now the dominant story. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 34% for H100, 60% for H200, and 67% for B200, meaning next-gen silicon is sitting idle at unprecedented levels. B200 spot crashed 26.6% day-over-day to $4.58/hr as surplus inventory floods the market, while H200 volatility at 209% annualized signals panic repricing across the supply chain.
paragraphs: GPU oversupply is now the dominant story. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 34% for H100, 60% for H200, and 67% for B200, meaning next-gen silicon is sitting idle at unprecedented levels. B200 spot crashed 26.6% day-over-day to $4.58/hr as surplus inventory floods the market, while H200 volatility at 209% annualized signals panic repricing across the supply chain.

At TCO-adjusted costs (1.25x spot), B200 inference runs $4.19/M tokens for Llama 70B, making it the only GPU where medium-tier API sellers aren't hemorrhaging cash. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output on H100 TCO of $8.54/M is selling at a loss of roughly $8.20 per million tokens. Grades: OpenAI Neutral, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, open-source Burning Cash.

B200 spot at $4.58/hr is overvalued given 67% availability and collapsing utilization, with further downside to the $4.00 floor likely. A100 at $1.04/hr is undervalued as the only class holding utilization above 60% with the lowest volatility at 58%, making legacy compute the contrarian long.
bullets: 67% of B200 compute capacity sits available, the widest oversupply of any GPU class.
34% util-avail on H100 marks a 30.6 percentage point utilization drop in 30 days, signaling rapid demand erosion.
$4.58 median B200 spot is down 26.6% in one day, the largest single-session GPU price collapse on record.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier output tokens cost 78% less than GPT-4 launch pricing.
$0.18 per million output tokens for OpenAI gpt-oss-120b is the cheapest proprietary inference ever offered.
208.7% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the most unstable compute asset in the index.
